channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Trump Says Federal Government Could Assume Greater Control of Washington, D.C., if Socialist-Aligned Mayoral Candidate Wins

item.title: Chase Sapphire Preferred Card Updates Add New Rewards and Credits While Reducing Hyatt Transfer Value

item.description: New Mexico Environment Secretary James Kenney warned state lawmakers that ongoing regulatory disputes with the federal government could jeopardize New Mexico’s ability to oversee environmental conditi...

item.title: Microsoft to restrict Office 2019 for Mac to read-only mode starting July 13 due to expired certificate
item.description: Microsoft will begin restricting functionality in Office 2019 for Mac starting July 13, 2026, effectively preventing users from editing, saving, or creating new documents in key applications such as W...

item.title: Exploring Melbourne’s Laksa Scene: Regional Styles, Cultural Origins and Where to Try Them
item.description: This article explores Melbourne’s growing appreciation for laksa, a diverse family of noodle soups originating from Malaysia, Singapore and Indonesia. While there are many regional variations, curry l...

item.title: Phil Mickelson Reportedly Removed from Membership at San Diego-Area Golf Club Following Misconduct Allegation
item.description: Golf legend Phil Mickelson has reportedly lost his membership at The Farms Golf Club near San Diego after allegations involving inappropriate physical contact with a female employee. According to sour...

item.title: Opinion Column Uses Pentagon False Alarm to Criticize Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth's Leadership
item.description: This opinion article by John Casey uses a temporary hazardous materials alarm at the Pentagon as a metaphor for what the author views as deeper problems under Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth's leadersh...

item.title: Trump Cancels Planned Military Strikes on Iran After Announcing Renewed Diplomatic Progress

item.title: The 1947 Marshall Field’s Charm Training Program for Elevator Operators in Chicago
item.description: In 1947, Marshall Field & Co., the well-known Chicago department store, launched an eight-week charm school program aimed at its female elevator operators, often referred to as “elevator girls.” The i...

item.title: Mike Johnson avoids questions on Trump proposal to seize Iran’s Kharg Island oil facility
item.description: House Speaker Mike Johnson, a Republican from Louisiana, declined to directly answer questions from reporters on Thursday regarding President Donald Trump’s recent comments about potentially seizing I...

item.title: Group of England Supporters Built New Lives in North America After Traveling to the 1986 World Cup in Mexico
item.description: A group of young friends from England’s Black Country traveled to Mexico to support the England national football team during the 1986 FIFA World Cup and ended up changing the course of their lives. A...
